finding_results.notes: Rebuilt the breakfast-to-class routine into a continuous on-page exchange where Miren pressures Gavin, Duncan adds quiet pressure, and Gavin's manuscript fixation intrudes before the class-summary beat resumes.
Replaced the abstract moral explanation with withheld questions, silence, physical hesitation, and the wrong response landing in the room.

Replaced the interpretive characterization 'something smaller and more tired than that' with the physical gesture 'just a shift at the corners.' The narration no longer attributes emotional quality to Duncan's mouth movement — it records the physical fact (a shift at the corners, there and gone) and lets Duncan's spoken line ('Yeah. It is.') carry the scene's emotional weight. The prior draft (snapshot line 165) had a full thesis paragraph translating the expression into meaning ('A shape that said: I know what you're doing...'); the chapter's pre-revision state had already trimmed that to 'something smaller and more tired,' which still interpreted rather than observed. The revision completes the move to pure gesture.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised Chapter 9 to dramatize Gavin's daily drift under live social pressure, stripped moral cushioning from the Duncan scene, and removed premature nosebleeds to keep Gavin's Chapter 9 physical costs aligned with continuity.

Single finding addressed. The Duncan common-room scene's closing beat was revised to remove narrator interpretation of Duncan's facial expression. The interpretive clause ('something smaller and more tired than that') was replaced with a physical observation ('just a shift at the corners'), preserving the existing rhythm ('there and gone before it settled into anything') and letting the spoken exchange do the emotional work without narratorial translation. All dialogue throughout the chapter was audited against style bible contraction levels and idiolect profiles; no additional defects were found. No style bible example lines appear verbatim. Heading contract preserved.
Revised chapter 09 for prose/copyedit finish by removing the packeted comparison and negation scaffolds in the cited spans and documenting the fix with updated line evidence.
